title: Mace calculator
description: Calculates damage multiplier on a mace. Works with enchants.
body:
🎯 Features

  ✅ Smash Damage Preview

  Real-time damage display updating as you fall

  ✅ Kill Height Threshold

  Shows minimum fall needed to one-shot your target

  ✅ Damage Curve Graph

  Press G to toggle damage curve visualization

  ✅ Overkill Waste Display

  Shows wasted damage after kills (3 second display)

  ✅ Density Bonus Display

  Shows extra damage from Density enchantment
  (Note: Density detection will be enhanced in v1.1)

  🖥️ HUD Display

  ╔═══════════════════════╗
  ║ Mace Calculator       ║
  ║ Damage: 26.0 ❤       ║
  ║ Fall: 5.0 blocks      ║
  ║ Target: Zombie        ║
  ║ HP: 10.0/10.0 ❤      ║
  ║ LETHAL!               ║
  ║ [Graph when enabled]  ║
  ╚═══════════════════════╝
